data.name: HoRD: Robust Humanoid Control via History-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning and Online Distillation

data.description: HoRD: Robust Humanoid Control via History-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning and Online Distillation uses Domain Randomization.
HoRD: Robust Humanoid Control via History-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning and Online Distillation uses Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
HoRD: Robust Humanoid Control via History-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning and Online Distillation uses Sim-to-Real Transfer.
